posts.author: TateDemarcus
posts.title: Bee Forum News: Canadian Curling Team Kindly And Graciously Euthanized

link_metadata.description: Curling has long been the one sport in the Winter Olympics that viewers only watch accidentally and then wonder for a brief second why and how it became an Olympic sport. However, all that changed this Olympics when Sweden accused Canada of cheating and produced a video to prove it. Evidently, the referees had never thought of watching the 'hog line' to see if players were actually following the rules, thus allowing the Canadian team to beat Sweden by cheating. After the scandal broke, Canada being Canada immediately called in MAID service to clean things up, and the entire team has been kindly and graciously euthanized. Officials have given the slightly tarnished silver medals to the athletes' next of kin.
link_metadata.title: Bee Forum News: Canadian Curling Team Kindly And Graciously Euthanized

posts.title: FCC Rule That Requires Leftist TV Hosts to Play Fair Leads Colbert to Dump Dem Interview from Network Rather Than Provide Equal Time to Republicans

link_metadata.description: In January, The Gateway Pundit reported that the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) announced a crackdown on partisan talk shows in both daytime and late-night in an effort to provide equal treatment for political candidates.
